data.description: The currency of the realm.

Is refined into the primary elemental magic.

A common ore used in crafting.

Essential for life and potion-making.

A gelatinous creature's residue.

Bark from the ancient trees.
A leaf pulsing with raw mana.
A crystalline fragment of heat.

A legendary spark of ancient power.
A tough, heat-resistant scale from a desert predator.
Condensed sunlight that pulses with warmth.

Determines the physical power of a character.
Affects the speed and evasion of a character.
Influences the effectiveness of magical abilities.
Determines the frequency of character actions.
Watch the intro cinematic.
Complete the tutorial section of the game.
Explore the local village.
Get a potion from the town shop.
Find the lost book of cadences.
Discover the power of your inner voice.
Hear the rumors of the corrupted forest.
Clear out the local goblin encampment.
Harvest wood from the corrupted forest.
Find out where the miners went.
Clear the mine entrance of bats.
Venture deeper into the webs.
Clear the lower levels of sticky residue.
Obtain permission to mine Iron Ore.
Extract precious metals from the earth.
Pick glowing fruit from the woods.
Face the protector of the forest.
Decipher the ruins' entrance.
Locate the central power source of the ruins.
Ignite the ancient Mythril Forge.
Gather fallen wood for the local lumberjack.
Trade a basic gem for gold at the town market.
Search the desert sands for abandoned materials.
Take down the predators of the dunes.
Find the legendary sanctuary in the waste.
Use healing magic to cleanse the corruption from the sacred grove.
Channel intense fire magic to reignite the ancient Mythril Forge.
Harvest prismatic fragments from the peak's formations.
Map the dangerous heights of the Crystal Peaks.
Gather biological components from the Tidal Caverns.
Search the lightless depths for rare coral.
Search through stacks of ancient writings.
Learn from the preserved knowledge of the library.
Face the ultimate defender of the Mythril Heart.
Focus your mind to achieve permanent magical growth.
Push your body to achieve permanent physical growth.

A master of the arcane and material arts.

A strength-based specialist focused on harvesting rare earth materials.
A speed-based specialist focused on exploring deep waters.
An elite combatant unlocked through mastery of both strength and speed.
